description: Goal: finish the cleanup by deleting retired code paths and making the new model explicit in docs and telemetry. Signal: no dead duplicate publication/fragment-transport helpers remain; docs state the invariants clearly (quoted roots are the only source authority, expansion is root->root, publication is one transaction, type fragments are token payloads); telemetry/fixture checks prove compiler2 is not silently falling back to old-world behavior. Strategy: remove leftovers from the earlier split paths, update the agent docs and migration docs, and add the narrow regression/telemetry checks that keep this spine honest.
title: Compiler2 source spine closeout: remove retired paths and restate the design
